query: SELECT tipoAcao, categoria, COUNT(*) as total FROM conhecimentos WHERE tipoAcao IS NOT NULL GROUP BY tipoAcao, categoria HAVING COUNT(*) > 3 ORDER BY total DESC LIMIT 20;
